since_last: 44% of 99 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.58%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 44% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.81% · BTC +1.57% · Gold -0.49% · Nasdaq100 +1.62%. 44% of 99 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.58%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.58%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.13%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NVT is the standout at +5.49%
cards.body: Leaders: NVT +5.49%, INOD +2.56%, META +1.97%, NOW +1.57%, BABA +1.22%. Laggards: POWL -3.54%, INTC -3.37%, NXE -3.25%, MU -2.59%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.74% at $149.52
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.74% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
